overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through Night City at dusk. The journey begins under an overpass, continues through neon-lit commercial boulevards, passes a massive illuminated ferris wheel, and transitions onto a winding mountain highway with rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass exit transitioning to urban boulevard

events.description: exiting covered concrete underpass into open urban environment with visible skyline
accelerating after completing the exit curve onto straight multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: riding a motorcycle out from under an overpass and accelerating onto a city highway, passing under road signage

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with red accent lighting underneath
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows and corporate signage
green street sign indicating MLK Blvd mounted on traffic light pole
large satellite communication dishes visible on building rooftops in distance

segments.scene_description: The clip begins under a massive concrete overpass with red accent lighting. The motorcycle exits the covered area into an open urban environment at dusk, revealing futuristic glass towers and satellite dishes in the distance. The rider accelerates onto a multi-lane road passing a green MLK Blvd street sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with palm trees

events.description: entering commercial district with prominent neon signage and illuminated billboards
passing through intersection with green traffic light while other vehicles cross perpendicular

agents.ego_description: cruising down a commercial boulevard lined with palm trees, passing illuminated storefronts and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights on traveling in opposite lane

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the commercial street
large illuminated billboard with purple and pink neon lighting
low-rise commercial buildings with bright signage and glass facades
faint pink glow of a massive ferris wheel visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide commercial boulevard lined with palm trees and illuminated by vibrant neon signage. The motorcycle cruises past holographic advertisements and commercial storefronts. A massive ferris wheel becomes visible in the distance, glowing pink against the darkening sky. Sparse traffic includes an oncoming car in the opposite lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: entertainment district with giant illuminated ferris wheel

events.description: approaching the massive illuminated ferris wheel structure that dominates the skyline
slowing and making a sharp right turn around the base of the ferris wheel structure

agents.ego_description: navigating around the base of a massive illuminated ferris wheel, making a right turn through the entertainment district

entered.detail: massive steel ferris wheel with bright pink and purple LED illumination
cylindrical digital billboard structure with rotating advertisements
concrete wall with prominent 'NO REGRETS' graffiti text

segments.scene_description: The ferris wheel becomes the dominant landmark, growing from a distant glow to a massive illuminated structure filling the sky. The motorcycle slows and makes a sharp right turn around its base, passing a wall with 'NO REGRETS' graffiti and cylindrical rotating billboards. The area is an entertainment district with amusement arcade buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain highway with rocky cliffs

events.description: leaving urban commercial area and entering mountain highway with rocky terrain
accelerating to high speed on the winding mountain road, reaching 80+ km/h
entering section with steep rocky cliff walls on the left side of the highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating along a winding mountain highway, navigating curves at high speed between rocky cliffs and guardrails

notable_agents.action: black car overtaking on the right side at high speed

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with brown and gray stone texture
metal guardrail along the right edge of the winding road
large industrial building complex visible on the hillside in the distance
concrete wall supporting the rocky hillside along the road

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts dramatically from urban to natural as the motorcycle leaves the ferris wheel behind and enters a winding mountain highway. The road curves through rocky terrain with steep cliff walls on one side and metal guardrails on the other. The rider accelerates to high speeds, navigating the bends as the sky darkens further into night. An industrial complex is visible on the distant hillside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transforms from a neon-drenched urban center into a desolate, winding mountain highway. It begins under a massive concrete overpass with red accent lighting, accelerating out into an open cityscape of glass towers and satellite dishes at dusk. As the rider cruises onto a wide commercial boulevard, the environment shifts into a vibrant district of palm trees and holographic advertisements, with a glowing pink ferris wheel gradually emerging as the dominant landmark. The camera then pivots through a sharp right turn around the base of the wheel, passing rotating billboards and graffiti-covered walls in a dense entertainment zone. Finally, the urban sprawl gives way to a dramatic natural landscape as the motorcycle speeds along a curving mountain road flanked by steep rocky cliffs and metal guardrails under a darkening night sky.
